style_effects: Flickering translucent purple-black aura pulses softly around Venusaur's body, casting distorted, elongated shadows that twist unnaturally in the air. Slow drifting mist particles swirl in the dim light, each carrying faint ghostly afterimages, while energy pulses of deep violet light ripple through its translucent skin. The lighting mood is an eerie, cold blue-white luminescence that casts long, wavering shadows on the ground, creating an unsettling atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
